summary: Tested redesigned Shop page personalized pet-first experience. All major features working correctly including personalized headlines, pet selector, breed images, pet picks badges, trust badges, tabs, search, and mobile responsive layout. Found 1 bug: Age calculation showing 'NaN years'.

ui_bugs.issue: Age shows 'NaN years' in both the Age dropdown and 'For {petName}, NaN years' section header
ui_bugs.root_cause: Operator precedence issue in age calculation: `selectedPet?.age || selectedPet?.dob ? ...` evaluates incorrectly. When pet.age is undefined but pet.dob exists, it tries to calculate from dob but dob might be null/undefined or invalid format

action_items: Fix age calculation in ShopPage.jsx lines 326-327. Suggested fix: `const petAge = selectedPet?.age ? `${selectedPet.age} years` : selectedPet?.dob ? (new Date().getFullYear() - new Date(selectedPet.dob).getFullYear()) + ' years' : '';`
critical_code_review_comments: Line 326-327: Age calculation has operator precedence bug - needs parentheses or restructuring to separate age check from dob fallback calculation

success_rate.frontend: 95% - All features working except age calculation bug

seed_data_creation: Used existing test user testpicks@example.com with 2 pets
context_for_next_testing_agent: Shop page redesign with personalized pet-first experience. Key data-testids: shop-page, pet-selector, show-selection-btn, hero-pet-image, pet-picks-section, tab-products, tab-services, shop-search. Test user testpicks@example.com/test123 has 2 pets. BREED_IMAGES constant provides fallback Unsplash images by breed.

hero_personalized_headline.details: Shows 'Let's make life easier for {petName}.' when logged in with pets

pet_selector_dropdown.details: Can switch between Buddy and Luna, headline and image update correctly

breed_specific_placeholder_image.details: Shows Golden Retriever image for Buddy, Labrador image for Luna via BREED_IMAGES constant

show_my_selection_scroll.details: Button scrolls smoothly to pet-picks section

pet_picks_badges.details: Products show '{petName}'s Pick' badge (Buddy's Pick, Luna's Pick)

trust_badges.details: Vet Approved Advice, Easy Returns Anytime, Free Delivery Right To Your Door - all visible

products_services_tabs.details: Products tab (641), Services tab (50) - toggle works correctly

mobile_responsive.details: 390px viewport renders correctly with proper layout

age_dropdown.details: Shows 'NaN years' instead of actual pet age

rca_of_the_issue.current_code: const petAge = selectedPet?.age || selectedPet?.dob ? (new Date().getFullYear() - new Date(selectedPet.dob).getFullYear()) + ' years' : '';
rca_of_the_issue.issue: JavaScript operator precedence causes || to evaluate before ?. When selectedPet.age is undefined and selectedPet.dob is truthy (but possibly invalid), it enters the ternary true branch and tries to calculate from dob, resulting in NaN
rca_of_the_issue.fix_suggestion: const petAge = selectedPet?.age ? `${selectedPet.age} years` : (selectedPet?.dob ? (new Date().getFullYear() - new Date(selectedPet.dob).getFullYear()) + ' years' : '');
reproduction_steps: 3. Observe 'NaN years' in Age dropdown and 'For Buddy, NaN years' header
